details: Package name 'nodemon-copack' is structurally similar to the widely-used 'nodemon' package and could be a name-confusion attempt. No concrete installer-harm behavior (exfiltration, install-time remote code execution, credential theft, silent-relay, or known-bad infrastructure) was observed in the package contents. Name-similarity alone is a subjective signal that warrants human review to assess intent and decide whether the package is a legitimate fork/companion tool, an abandoned squat, or part of a campaign.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
